title: AfterShock
description: A Datapack That Summmons Lightning When You Kill Someone, Like In Hoplite.
body:
### **AfterShock Datapack**

This Datapack Is A Simple Creation That **Summons Lightning When You Kill Someone**, Or If You Die.

![Lightning Death](https://i.ytimg.com/vi/06zWmwJWrok/maxresdefault.jpg)
